info.name: Callified — Transcripts API
info.description:
API endpoints for fetching call transcripts from Callified.

## Quick start
1. Set the `host` collection variable to your environment:
   - Local: `http://localhost:8001`
   - testgo1: `https://testgo1.callified.ai`
2. Run **Login** first — it auto-saves the JWT into the `token` variable.
3. Subsequent requests use `{{token}}` automatically.

## Endpoints
- **Login** — exchange email/password for a JWT (24h validity).
- **Transcripts by phone** — all calls for the lead with this phone number, flat array.
- **Transcripts by name** — all calls for leads whose first/last name matches, grouped by lead.
- **Bulk export** — every campaign → its leads → their transcripts + Gemini conclusion. Best for one-shot dumps.

All authenticated endpoints are org-scoped: a user can only see their own org's data.

variable.description: Backend base URL. Change to https://testgo1.callified.ai for staging.
Callified user email used for the Login request.
Callified user password. Set per-environment, do not commit.
JWT — populated automatically by the Login request's test script.

item.name: Login (run first)
item.description: Exchange email + password for a JWT. The response token is saved into the `token` collection variable automatically.

exec: console.warn('No token in response — check email/password');

item.name: Transcripts by phone
item.description:
Returns every call for the lead matching this phone, as a flat array (one row per call).

Response shape:
```
[
  {
    "id":            259,
    "lead_id":       2,
    "lead_name":     "Harsha",
    "phone":         "9177007429",
    "duration_s":    56.7,
    "tts_language":  "en",
    "created_at":    "2026-04-28 10:01:08",
    "recording_url": "/api/recordings/...wav",
    "transcript":    [{"role":"AI","text":"..."}, ...]
  }
]
```

Returns `[]` (200 OK) when no lead matches that phone in the caller's org.

item.name: Transcripts by name
item.description:
Returns calls grouped by lead, since one name can match multiple leads in an org (e.g. two Harshas).

Partial matches are allowed — `Hars` matches `Harsha`. URL-encode the name when it contains spaces (`John%20Doe`).

Response shape:
```
[
  {
    "lead_id":   2,
    "lead_name": "Harsha",
    "phone":     "9177007429",
    "calls": [
      {
        "id":            259,
        "duration_s":    56.7,
        "tts_language":  "en",
        "created_at":    "...",
        "recording_url": "...",
        "transcript":    [...]
      }
    ]
  }
]
```

Returns `[]` (200 OK) when no name matches.

item.name: Bulk export — all campaigns + transcripts + conclusions
item.description:
Single call that returns every campaign in the caller's org, with all leads nested underneath each campaign, and all calls (transcript + Gemini conclusion) nested under each lead.

Use the optional `?campaign_id=` query param to scope to one campaign — useful when the org is large enough that pulling everything at once would be slow.

The `conclusion` field is `null` when no Gemini review exists for the call (e.g. very short calls where analysis was skipped).

Response shape:
```
[
  {
    "campaign_id":   5,
    "campaign_name": "Whatsapp campaign",
    "channel":       "WhatsApp",
    "status":        "active",
    "created_at":    "2026-04-12 09:00:00",
    "totals":        { "total": 2, "called": 2, "qualified": 0, "booked": 0 },
    "leads": [
      {
        "lead_id":   12,
        "lead_name": "Harsha",
        "phone":     "9177007429",
        "status":    "Completed",
        "calls": [
          {
            "id":            259,
            "duration_s":    56.7,
            "tts_language":  "en",
            "created_at":    "...",
            "recording_url": "...",
            "transcript":    [...],
            "conclusion":    {
              "quality_score":                 4.0,
              "sentiment":                     "positive",
              "customer_sentiment":            "interested",
              "appointment_booked":            true,
              "failure_reason":                "",
              "summary":                       "...",
              "what_went_well":                "...",
              "what_went_wrong":               "...",
              "insights":                      "...",
              "prompt_improvement_suggestion": "..."
            }
          }
        ]
      }
    ]
  }
]
```

query.description: Optional — restrict to one campaign. Omit for all campaigns in the org.
